title: Orbital Strike Canon By Itz
description: Orbital Strike Cannon As Similar Like On the Untable SMP
body:
[Subscribe Please](https://www.youtube.com/@ItzRealHusky)

If you have a problem with the plugin contact me in my discord server or at this email addres: itzrealhusky@gmail.com

**Please Consider Donating On PayPal**

Orbital Strike Cannon By Itz Husky
A Plugin that adds orbital strike cannon as similar as Wemmbu had.

_**IMPORTANT:
Paper: Set max-tnt-per-tick: 1000000 in spigot.yml or the tnt will bounce
DO NOT Middle Click Dupe any of the items otherwise it will not work
**_

**_Features_**
Commands that trigger a nuke or stab shot just like Wemmbu did on Unstable Universe.

Payloads:

-Nuke:

Payload Size: 15 rings

-Stab:

Payload Height: -64 to Height Limit

-Wolf:

Wolf Amount: 150 wolfs (default)

-Stasis:

Teleports you where you set the coordinates

-Totem Stasis:

Teleports you with a 0.5s delay to whatever you set the coordinates to

-Railgun:

Shoots 45 Arrows that oneshots anything

-Darkness:

Gives all players in a 50 block range 25s of darkness effect (except the user)

-Pearl Canon:

It will give you an ender pearl and when you trow it it will tp you to selected coords

 
 
#Other Features:
 
 Unstable DeathBan

Bans and plays a wither sound when a player dies
  
  ProximityMessages

Limits the range on how far leave/join/death messages can be seen by players
   
   Mafia Void

When command trigered it will give you a fishing rod that will teleport a certain player to the void.




```
COMANDS:

Nuke Shot:	/givef nuke <amount> [rings]

Stab Shot:	/givef stab <amount>

Wolf:	/givef wolf <amount> [wolf count]

Stasis:	/givef stasis <amount> <X> <Y> <Z>

Totem Stasis:	/givef totem-stasis <amount> <X> <Y> <Z>

Railgun:	/givef railgun straight <amount>

Darkness:	/givef darkness <amount> <duration> <range>

Pearl Cannon:	/givef pearlcannon <amount> <X> <Y> <Z>

Command Examples:
            
/givef nuke 2

/givef nuke 1 16

/givef stab 14

/givef wolf 1 40

/givef stasis 1 8272 -12 917

/givef stasis 1 100 64 200

/givef totem-stasis 1 500 70 -300

/givef railgun straight 1

/givef darkness 1 25 50

/givef pearlcannon 1 100 64 200

/ossetting proximity-range 250

/ossetting death-sound-range 150

/ossetting death-sound true

/ossetting recipe true

/ossetting rod-delay 1

/ossetting tp-delay 7

/ossetting arrow-velocity 50000

/ossetting arrow-delay 0

/ossetting ban-duration 1d

/ossetting mafia-delay 2

/ossetting nuke-rings 15

/ossetting wolf-amount 150

/ossetting darkness-duration 25

/ossetting darkness-range 50

/ossetting pearlcannon-delay 7

/deathban true

/deathban false

/orbitalstrike nuke 100 64 200

/orbitalstrike stab 50 70 -100

/orbitalstrike wolf 0 80 0

/orbitalstrike railgun 300 65 150

/orbitalstrike stasis 500 70 -200
```
